summary: Weekly timesheet usability release with searchable project selection and clearer project-block status labels.

notes: No database schema or RLS migration is included in this release.
The weekly timesheet project field now uses an inline searchable combobox dropdown instead of a long plain select list.
Project search matches both project code and project name while keeping project selection required.
Project-block status badges now display readable Chinese labels for draft, pending, approved, summary pending, and rejected states.

deployment.nas: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.15.3 and rebuild attendance-module with IMAGE_TAG=V0.15.3.
deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.15.3 and rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.15.3.

verification: Verify cloud and NAS containers are rebuilt with V0.15.3.
Verify the timesheet project picker can search by project code or project name.
